title: Belle Vous Glass Food Storage Jars (10 Pack) - 160ml/5.4oz Containers with Airtight Lids for Kitchen/Pantry Organisation - Glass Canisters for Spice, Sugar, Coffee & More
features: STORAGE CONTAINER SET: Organise your home, kitchen or office with this set of 10 glass storage jars. The food storage containers measure W9.5 x H8cm (3.7 x 3.2 inches) with a capacity of 160ml (5.4oz). Each attractive glass jar comes with a black silicone lid.

STURDY AND NON-TOXIC: Our transparent containers are made with durable, sturdy borosilicate glass. The material is BPA-free and non-toxic, making it safe for food storage. Additionally, the reusable jars are easy to clean by hand/dishwasher safe for your convenience.

AIRTIGHT AND LEAKPROOF: Each of these food storage jars has a tight-fitting silicone lid. The airtight lids protect against moisture and air, whilst holding in the aromas/flavours of your food. Our decorative pots ensure the long-lasting freshness of your food.

PERFECT FOOD STORAGE: You can use these containers to store food, flour, sugar, cereal, salt, herbs/spices, pasta, seeds, nuts, beans, powders, sauces, rice, tea/coffee, candy, overnight oats, yoghurt and more. The stackable jars will fit perfectly in your kitchen cabinets or drawers.

VERSATILE CONTAINERS: These space-saving storage jars can also be used to hold art/craft supplies, buttons, crayons, glitters, screws, paints and more. As they're transparent, you can easily see the contents of each pot. They're also ideal for travel, office lunches or picnics.

Each attractive glass jar comes with a black silicone lid and has a capacity of 160ml (5.4oz). Our transparent containers are made with durable, sturdy borosilicate glass. The material is BPA-free and non-toxic, making it safe for food storage. Additionally, the reusable jars are easy to clean by hand/dishwasher safe for your convenience. Each of these food storage jars has a tight-fitting silicone lid. The lids protect against moisture and air, whilst holding in the aromas/flavours of your food. Our decorative pots ensure the long-lasting freshness of your food. You can use these containers to store food, flour, sugar, cereal, salt, herbs/spices, pasta, seeds, nuts, beans, powders, sauces, rice, tea/coffee, candy, overnight oats, yoghurt and more. The stackable jars will fit perfectly in your kitchen cabinets or drawers. They're also ideal for travel, office lunches or picnics. What’s Included: -10 x Glass food storage jars.
